mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month momentum in INDPRO signals improving production volumes and operating leverage, raising near-term earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value 103.4677 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if the 3-month change in INDPRO has nonpositive Rank IC with 20-day S&P 500 forward returns over two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses upward through its 12-month moving average and rises by more than 50 basis points in 3 months, discount-rate pressure dominates cash-flow news and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its 12-month moving average and rises > 0.50pp in 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value 0.08 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward cases or the mean triggered return exceeds the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: PAYEMS growth accompanied by a stable or falling UNRATE signals broad labor-income expansion without an unemployment shock, supporting consumption and earnings revisions and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE does not rise over the same 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot value 150399.0 and UNRATE latest snapshot value 3.8
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-stable signal has lower average 20-day forward returns than periods where PAYEMS is not rising.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp deterioration in HOUST signals weakening residential investment and household durables demand, leading cyclical earnings downgrades and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average and falls > 10% over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot value 1638.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST breakdown triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of observations or show no downside skew versus baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPIAUCSL while FEDFUNDS remains below 1% signals a negative real-rate inflation overshoot that pulls forward tightening expectations and compresses equity multiples, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth exceeds 4% and FEDFUNDS < 1%
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value 284.182 and FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value 0.08
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-high and FEDFUNDS-low interaction has nonnegative 20-day mean excess return relative to all other observations in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Higher short-term momentum in RSAFS indicates stronger consumer spending and revenue growth for index constituents, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as demand news is incorporated.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value 649776.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 1-month changes in RSAFS are not associated with higher 5-day S&P 500 forward returns than negative 1-month changes across rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE crosses more than 0.3 percentage points above its trailing 12-month low, labor-market slack is rising and recession risk reprices upward, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses > 0.3pp above its trailing 12-month low
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value 3.8 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE crossing triggers do not reduce average 60-day S&P 500 forward returns versus nontriggered periods by at least 100 basis points.

mechanism_narrative: Positive GDPC1 growth confirmed by rising INDPRO while FEDFUNDS stays below 1% signals real activity recovery under accommodative policy, lifting earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 2-quarter growth is positive, INDPRO 3-month change is positive, and FEDFUNDS < 1%
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest snapshot value 19810.572, INDPRO 103.4677, FEDFUNDS 0.08
failure_condition: Reject if the joint recovery-and-low-rate signal has lower 60-day S&P 500 forward returns than periods with negative GDPC1 or INDPRO growth.
